title: Fermented Gooey Uruguayan Strawberry Casserole
description: A twist on the traditional Uruguayan dessert, this casserole combines the sweetness of strawberries with the tanginess of fermented milk, all wrapped up in a gooey, low-fat-friendly package.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, and salt.
Add the melted butter, brown sugar, and vanilla extract to the dry ingredients and mix until a crumbly mixture forms.
In a separate bowl, combine the sliced strawberries and fermented milk. Mix until the strawberries are evenly coated.
Pour the strawberry mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with the crumbly mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the topping is golden brown and the casserole is set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10-15 minutes.
Dust with confectioners' sugar before serving.
